page_metadata.biotools__summary:
an optimal mapping tool for sRNA-Seq reads.

srnaMapper uses the bwa API, and the bwa index files. Use bwa index to generate the index files.

an optimal mapping tool for sRNA-Seq reads.

srnaMapper uses the bwa API, and the bwa index files. Use bwa index to generate the index files.
